title: lipotriche scandens subsp. dregei
intro: Lipotriches scandens subsp. dregei, also known as the African thistle or Drege's thistle, is a flowering plant species in the family Asteraceae, native to the Eastern Cape and Western Cape provinces of South Africa. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Lipotriches scandens subsp. dregei are attributed to its ability to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and exhibit antioxidant properties, potentially helping to protect against cell damage and oxidative stress. Traditionally, the plant is used in herbal preparations, often in the form of infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, to treat various ailments, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
